DESIGN COMPLIANCE AND INDEMNITY

This design complies with Endeavour Energy's relevant standards as current at this
time and as listed on the Endeavour Energy Accredited Service Provider's
Internet site. These standards include, but are not limited to:
CP: Connection Policy
EMS: Environmental Management Standard
MX: Mains Construction Instruction
MD: Mains Design Instruction
PEI: Protection Equipment Instruction
PD: Protection Design Instruction

MMI: Mains Maintenance Instruction
IDI: Installation Design Instruction
LDI 0001: Public lighting Electrical Design Element
Additionally, where relevant, the design complies with AS/NZS 7000 "Overhead Line
Design - Detailed Procedures" published by The Australian Standards.

AECOM AUSTRALIA PTY LTD indemnifies Endeavour Energy
for any loss or damage resulting from non-compliance
of the design with the above standards.

3. DESIGN CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE: -
(i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED
WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS

OR
(ii) WORKS COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION HAS
BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6)
MONTHS
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE

BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.

sub-step-extract-all-notes.value:
1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY NETWORK STANDARDS AND CONNECT ON POLICY. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131 081. DESIGN CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE: - (i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS CERTIFICATION. OR (ii) WORKS COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
2. ATTENTION PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS AREA. THESE MARKS ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF ANY WORKS.
3. ATTENTION ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
4. WARNING LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES AND OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE 1100 FOR SEARCH TWO (2) DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
5. ATTENTION SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPARTMENT DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS. TELEPHONE: 131 081.
6. OPERATIONAL LIMITS UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE CONSIDERED:- • MOBILE GENERATOR AND SUBSTATIONS; • LIVE LINE WORK; • DESIGN ALTERNATIVES; • LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS; • WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS; THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER.
7. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED IN WRITING WITH ENDEAVOUR ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
8. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DESIGN? KEY NO:
9. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT PLAN: EMP EMS0001 IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
WARNING LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES & OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TEL: 1100 FOR SEARCHES TWO DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
CAUTION: UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTIONS TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE CONSIDERED: • MOBILE GENERATOR AND SUBSTATIONS • LIVE LINE WORK • DESIGN ALTERNATIVES • LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS • WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER.
